title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Supply Chain Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Delhivery Digital Technologies:
Delhivery Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Digital Technologies!
